name: Tortellini Stew with Autumn Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces Fresh tortellini (Contadinia or similar -- NOT dried)
2 cups Green beans, cut (fresh or frozen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot.
2. Add tortellini and onion; brown over high heat, stirring often, for 1-2 minutes or until the tortellini is nicely browned.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except parsley and parmesan. Stir and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
4. Cover and cook for 10-15 minutes or until vegetables are crisp but tender.
5. Just before serving, stir in parsley.
6. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
